author: bosulmun
content:
Hi, we found that Prysm and Lighthouse are using different buckets for the getBlobs latency histogram, and this seems to be the reason for the 10s latency spike.
I opened a PR on Prysm to fix this (https://github.com/OffchainLabs/prysm/pull/16844) 
Before combining the two metrics ->

author: bosulmun
content: We are working on improving the latency, but it would be nice to have more accurate statistics in the meantime 🙂
